caption:
HydraFacial vs. Chemical Peel: Both transform your skin. But they work in fundamentally different ways.

HYDRAFACIAL uses vortex suction technology to cleanse, extract, and hydrate simultaneously. It delivers serums deep into the skin while removing impurities—with zero downtime. Think of it as a deep clean + nutrient delivery system.

CHEMICAL PEELS use controlled acid solutions (glycolic, salicylic, TCA, or blends) to dissolve the bonds between dead skin cells. This controlled exfoliation triggers accelerated cell turnover and collagen stimulation. Downtime varies by depth: from a subtle glow-up to a full skin reset.

Best for immediate radiance before an event? HydraFacial.
Best for long-term texture correction and pigmentation? Chemical Peel.
Best for you? That depends on your skin's unique story.

Our clinicians assess your skin type, concerns, and goals to recommend the right treatment—or the right combination.

Book your skin analysis today.
mediaDescription: Split-screen comparison graphic. Left side: HydraFacial device with blue vortex visualization and key benefits listed. Right side: Chemical peel application with molecular structure overlay. Luxury white and gold design. Swipe-through carousel format.
